/usr/bin/ar qc ../lib/libtflm.a CMakeFiles/tflm.dir/tensorflow/compiler/mlir/lite/core/api/error_reporter.cc.o CMakeFiles/tflm.dir/tensorflow/compiler/mlir/lite/schema/schema_utils.cc.o /usr/bin/ranlib ../lib/libtflm.a
